deployment.discordRuntimeInventory: OWNER DASHBOARD AVAILABLE; LIVE OWNER SESSION NOT INSPECTED

implemented: Community, Clan and TSBTR setup templates
Backup, diff preview, repair, guide-only and typed rebuild confirmation
Live Discord inventory API for the authenticated owner
Configurable branding, channels, challenge, LOA, activity and AutoMod
Profile create/view/edit/status and short Roblox verification
Challenge target rules, cooldown, immunity, LOA and active-ticket blocks
Challenge sticky header, autowin, close and approval workflow
Training session ownership, result, MVP, proof and activity logging
Structured tryout rank authority and approval
Turkish/English help and regenerated handbook messages
Relations, channel mapping and staff activity safety controls
blockedOrDeferred: Destructive live server rebuild requires typed Discord confirmation.
Multi-user Discord role and permission test requires real member/referee/manager interactions.
External server FCW scraping/DM is not implemented because self-bot behavior is prohibited.
Voice music playback requires a separate licensed media service.
